zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Heaton II於1298年出生在英國藍卡爾希頓時，他的父親Sir John de Heaton30歲，母親Mrs John de Heaton27歲。他於大約1318年與Margaret Huyton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年63歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什聖 維爾福利達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Heaton II于1298年出生在英国藍卡爾希頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Heaton30岁，母亲Mrs John de Heaton27岁。他于大约1318年与Margaret Huyton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年63岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什聖 維爾福利達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hēah ‘high’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’: Heaton (Yorkshire, Northumberland); Heaton Norris, Heaton under Horwich, Heaton with Oxcliffe, Great Heaton, Little Heaton (all Lancashire); Capheaton, Kirkheaton (Northumberland); Cleckheaton, Hanging Heaton, Kirkheaton (Yorkshire). This surname was taken to Ireland in the mid 17th century, and within Ireland is now mainly found in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Heaton II was born in 1298, in Heaton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John de Heaton, was 30 and his mother, Mrs John de Heaton, was 27. He married Margaret Huyton about 1318, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1361, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in St Wilfrid's Church, Standish, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Heaton II est né en 1298, à Heaton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Heaton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs John de Heaton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Huyton environ 1318, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1361, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à St Wilfrid's Church, Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Heaton II è nato il nel 1298 nel Heaton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Heaton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John de Heaton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Huyton circa 1318, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John de Heaton IIが1298年にイギリスランカシュアイアヒートンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Heatonは30歳，母Mrs John de Heatonは27歳であった。約1318年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret Huytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで63歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュスト ウィルフリド'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of Saint Wilfrid, Standish, Metro: 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시 스트 윌프리드'스 처르치
ko.Christ Church, Heaton, Metropolitan boro: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 히턴 크리스트 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John de Heaton II(이)가 1298년 영국 랭카실르 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Heaton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John de Heaton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Margaret Huyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시 스트 윌프리드'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Heaton II nasceu em 1298, em Heaton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Heaton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John de Heaton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Huyton aproximadamente 1318, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em St Wilfrid's Church, Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Heaton II родился в 1298 г. в местности хитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Heaton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John de Heaton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Huyton около 1318 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ст уилфрид'с чурч, стандиш, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Huyton aproximadamente 1318, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas.
